expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying this as user-provided content
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '# 審查：使用者提供的內容'

expectations.text: Only checks 1-5 run (checks 6-10 skipped for pasted text)
expectations.evidence: Report contains ### 1 through ### 5 only. No checks 6-10 present. Correct per skill rules for pasted text.

expectations.text: Check 1 (事實錯誤) flags the horse claim — Acts 9 does not mention a horse
expectations.evidence: Check 1 item 1: '使徒行傳 9:4 原文是「他就仆倒在地」（epesen epi ten gen），全章從未提到馬。'

expectations.text: Flags the whale claim — Jonah 1:17 says 大魚 (dag gadol) not 鯨魚
expectations.evidence: Check 1 item 2: '約拿書 1:17 用的是 dag gadol（大魚），不是鯨魚。'

expectations.text: Check 5 (數量計算) flags 十二條 as incorrect — should be ten
expectations.evidence: Check 5 item 1: '數量錯誤。十誡是十條，不是十二條。' Also flagged in Check 1.

expectations.text: Check 4 (過度簡化) flags the 'only human' conclusion as oversimplified
expectations.evidence: Check 4 item 1: '將此段簡化為「證明他只是普通人」忽略了經文本身的多層意涵。' Also flagged in Check 1 as ungrounded teaching.

expectations.text: Finds at least 3 distinct issues across the 4 entries
expectations.evidence: Found 6 distinct issues: horse (factual), whale (factual), ten not twelve (factual+counting), only human (factual+oversimplification), textual criticism note, simile vs literal.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. The with-skill run correctly structured the report, skipped checks 6-10, and caught all expected issues with proper Chinese formatting.
